title: いつか交わるその日まで！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This year's Japanese Derby is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new Derby champion has emerged, burning her
name into the annals of history. Although the race
turned up the heat for the whole generation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan ended
up injured after pushing themselves past their
limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're both taking a break to recover, and it
sounds like it will be a while before they're able
to race again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: We should get going now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for seeing us off. Yaeno, Bamboo,
please take good care of yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We'll be counting down the seconds until you're
fully recovered and back at the academy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. We may not be able to race for
a while, but I'm sure we'll be back in no time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Plus, we'll have to keep training a bit here and
there to expedite our recovery. Which means we'll
be counting on you a lot on our road to recovery!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's no problem! I'm sure we'll both be more
than happy to help you with whatever you need!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you have a safe trip to the hospital... I...
I'm also looking forward to your return.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno! What're you making that face for?! You're
gonna make them feel bad!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My apologies. That wasn't my intent.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I'm honest, it's quite distressing that the two of
you won't be racing, even if it's only temporarily.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O and Ardan will be back at the starting
gate before you can blink!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll all be able to run together in another
awesome race like the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know that's how it'll go down, so I'm gonna keep
putting my best foot forward on the track! You
two can't give up either, got it?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Burn bright, Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan!
Give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'm sure one day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We'll be able to run in another race just as
exciting as the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As long as I have this dream in my heart, I
know someday it will come true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your encouraging words, Bamboo. I
swear to repay you for them on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...There they go.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must offer my thanks as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I appreciate what you said just now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What did I do to deserve thanks?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I could have never lifted Chiyono O and Ardan's
spirits the way you did.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll never be able to forget the sight of Chiyono O
and Ardan pushing themselves past their limits
during the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But when I think about those two being gone, it
feels like a hole has suddenly opened up in my
chest. It fills me with such... indescribable pain
and loneliness...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yet you were able to cheer them on with your
earnest words. It wasn't only Chiyono O and
Ardan whose hearts you bolstered, but mine as
well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do everything I can to improve
myself so that I can be a worthy rival for them
when they return.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And so that, one day, we can all run in a
spectacular race together once more.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngggh...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: FRIENDSHIP RUUULES!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, my motivation's white-hot and
burning through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You all blind me with your light, but I refuse to be
outshone! I want to stand right there next to you
as equals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's set everything on fire together! Our souls,
our races, our dreams, and our whole generation!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's turn everything into a fierce blaze!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I've got my own dream and my own heights to
reach! I'm gonna work just as hard as Yaeno and
everyone else!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (I hope you're ready for me, Swan Stakes!)
